name: indexBy-non-vec-throws
expect:
!{
  :origin :qlang/eval
  :kind :type-error
  :thrown :IndexBySubjectNotVec
  :message "indexBy requires Vec subject, got number"
  :operand "indexBy"
  :position "subject"
  :expectedType "Vec"
  :actualType :number
  :actualValue 42
  :fault {:step `indexBy(/k)` :input 42}
  :trail null
}

name: indexBy-non-keyword-key-throws
expect:
!{
  :origin :qlang/eval
  :kind :type-error
  :thrown :IndexByKeyNotKeyword
  :message "indexBy: key sub-pipeline must produce a keyword for every element, element 0 produced number"
  :index 0
  :actualType :number
  :actualValue 1
  :fault {
    :step `indexBy(/k)`
    :input [{:k 1}]
  }
  :trail null
}
